text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The user is viewing the results summary. A 'Filters' sidebar slides in from the right side of the screen, indicating a change in the UI state to allow for data filtering.",

    "time_end_ms": 900,
    "description": "The Filters sidebar appears on the right side of the screen.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The results summary page is visible with a new Filters panel appearing on the right."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'Select filter' dropdown menu and clicks it to see the available filtering options.",

    "time_start_ms": 1300,
    "time_end_ms": 1650,
    "description": "User clicks on the 'Select filter' dropdown menu.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Select filter",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the 'Select filter' dropdown in the Filters sidebar."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Upon clicking the dropdown, a list of filter categories (Participants, Age, Location, etc.) appears, changing the UI state.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 1650,
    "time_end_ms": 1900,
    "description": "The filter category dropdown menu opens.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "A dropdown menu is open showing various filter categories like Participants, Age, and Location."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user selects 'Completion date' from the list of filter categories to filter the results by when participants finished the task.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 2100,
    "time_end_ms": 2350,
    "description": "User selects 'Completion date' from the filter dropdown.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Completion date",
    "frame_description": "The user is choosing the 'Completion date' option from the open dropdown menu."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After selecting the category, the dropdown closes and a new UI element for configuring the 'Completion date' filter appears in the sidebar.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 2350,
    "time_end_ms": 2600,
    "description": "The filter configuration for 'Completion date' appears in the sidebar.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The sidebar now shows a configuration card for the 'Completion date' filter."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user decides to remove the newly added filter by clicking the 'x' icon on the filter card.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 3100,
    "time_end_ms": 3350,
    "description": "User clicks the 'x' to remove the 'Completion date' filter.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the close icon on the 'Completion date' filter card."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The filter card is removed from the sidebar, returning the UI to its previous state.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 3350,
    "time_end_ms": 3600,
    "description": "The 'Completion date' filter is removed from the sidebar.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The Filters sidebar is empty again after the filter is removed."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'Select filter' dropdown again to choose a different filter.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 10600,
    "time_end_ms": 10900,
    "description": "User clicks on the 'Select filter' dropdown menu.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Select filter",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the 'Select filter' dropdown in the sidebar."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The dropdown menu opens again, showing the list of filter categories.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 10900,
    "time_end_ms": 11200,
    "description": "The filter category dropdown menu opens.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The filter category dropdown is open."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user scrolls through the list and selects a specific question to filter by: 'How important is it to you to be able to pool your Askable earnings before withdrawing?'.",
    "type": "select",
    "time_start_ms": 15600,
    "time_end_ms": 15900,
    "description": "User selects a specific question filter from the dropdown.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "How important is it to you to be able to pool your Askable earnings before withdrawing?",
    "frame_description": "The user selects a long question text from the dropdown menu."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The UI updates to show the configuration options for the selected question filter, including rating and operator fields.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 15900,
    "time_end_ms": 17350,
    "description": "The configuration UI for the question filter appears.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The sidebar shows new fields for 'Rating' and an operator dropdown for the selected question."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks into the 'Rating' input field and types '5' to filter for participants who gave the highest rating.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 19700,
    "time_end_ms": 21100,
    "description": "User types '5' into the Rating input field.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Rating",
    "frame_description": "The number '5' is entered into the Rating text box in the filter configuration."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'Apply filter' button to update the results based on the configured criteria.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 22400,
    "time_end_ms": 22700,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Apply filter' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Apply filter",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the 'Apply filter' button at the bottom of the filter configuration."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The page content refreshes as the filter is applied, showing only the results that match the criteria.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 22700,
    "time_end_ms": 28500,
    "description": "The results update to reflect the applied filter.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The charts and participant list update to show filtered data."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'x' on the active filter tag in the sidebar to clear the filter and see all results again.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 28800,
    "time_end_ms": 29150,
    "description": "User clicks the 'x' to remove the active question filter.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the close icon on the active filter tag."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The filter is removed and the page content updates to show the full set of results.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 29150,
    "time_end_ms": 29550,
    "description": "The results update as the filter is removed.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The page content returns to the unfiltered state."
  },

    "time_end_ms": 38150,

    "description": "The task analysis page for 'Locate your Askable wallet' loads.",

  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks on the 'Heat map' tab to view the heat map visualization for this task.",
    "type": "click",
